project_type: React+Vite frontend with Express 5 + WebSocket backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsx for server
verification_instructions: Run tsc -b to typecheck. Run vite build to confirm frontend builds.
environment_constraints: No test runner; use TypeScript compilation as validation
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts manages all game state. UI components in src/components/. Game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. CSS in src/App.css (minified single-line). MANDATE_COLORS constant defined in PoliticsTrack.tsx. Online state sync via GAME_STATE WebSocket message handler in gameStore.ts. The .politics-track-slot CSS class already has position:relative.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React UI components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/utils/ - game logic, src/server/ - Express+WS backend, src/types/ - TypeScript types
